message:
fix: update mail tests to use FlexTime wrapper for CreatedTS

Update test data to use agentmail.FlexTime{Time: time.Now()} instead
of bare time.Now() for the CreatedTS field in InboxMessage structs.

This aligns with a change in the agentmail package where CreatedTS
was changed from time.Time to FlexTime (a wrapper that handles
flexible JSON time format parsing).

Affected tests:
- TestRunMailInbox: Single message test fixture
- TestMailReadWithFilters: Multiple message test fixtures (3 messages)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
